title: Increment Value
text: Increment Value Amount by which the value in the spin button is increased each time it is clicked. The default is 1 . Increment = Integer Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description Leading zeroes are automatically suppressed. For example, in a spin button with a minimum value of zero (0) and a maximum value of 10, the current value would be displayed as 0, 1, 2, through 10, and not 00, 01, 02, through 10. Applies To uspinbutton (SpinButton) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
